auth.label: API Token
auth.description: ActiveTrail API token used as the Authorization request header. Create a token in the ActiveTrail web interface under Settings > API Apps, as described in the official API guide: https://webapi.mymarketing.co.il/api/docs/Guides

actions.name: add_group_member
actions.description: Add or update a contact inside an ActiveTrail group.

subscribe_ip.description: The subscribe IP address recorded for the contact.

zip_code.description: The contact ZIP or postal code.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for adding or updating an ActiveTrail group member.

anyOf.description: The ActiveTrail contact state when returned.
Whether the contact is opted in when returned.
The contact email address when returned.
The contact SMS value when returned.
The contact first name when returned.
The contact last name when returned.

data.description: The raw object returned by ActiveTrail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for one ActiveTrail contact.

subscribe_ip.description: The subscribe IP address recorded for the contact.

zip_code.description: The contact ZIP or postal code.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating an ActiveTrail contact. Either email or sms must be provided. Additional ActiveTrail contact fields are passed through.

anyOf.description: The ActiveTrail contact state when returned.
Whether the contact is opted in when returned.
The contact email address when returned.
The contact SMS value when returned.
The contact first name when returned.
The contact last name when returned.

data.description: The raw object returned by ActiveTrail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for one ActiveTrail contact.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating an ActiveTrail group.

anyOf.description: The number of active contacts in the group when returned.
The total number of contacts in the group when returned.
The group creation timestamp when returned.
The last dynamic-group generation timestamp when returned.

data.description: The raw object returned by ActiveTrail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for one ActiveTrail group.

actions.name: delete_contact
actions.description: Delete one ActiveTrail contact by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting an ActiveTrail contact.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request was accepted by ActiveTrail.

data.description: The raw delete response returned by ActiveTrail, if any.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after deleting an ActiveTrail record.

actions.name: delete_group
actions.description: Delete one ActiveTrail group by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting an ActiveTrail group.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request was accepted by ActiveTrail.

data.description: The raw delete response returned by ActiveTrail, if any.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after deleting an ActiveTrail record.

actions.name: get_account_balance
actions.description: Fetch the current ActiveTrail email, SMS, and coupon account balances.

inputSchema.description: The empty input payload for this ActiveTrail action.

credits.description: The remaining credits in this balance bucket.

percent.description: The balance percentage reported by ActiveTrail.

alert_type.description: The ActiveTrail alert type for this balance bucket.

credits.description: The remaining credits in this balance bucket.

percent.description: The balance percentage reported by ActiveTrail.

alert_type.description: The ActiveTrail alert type for this balance bucket.

coupons.description: The coupon balance information returned by ActiveTrail.

data.description: The raw object returned by ActiveTrail.

actions.name: get_contact
actions.description: Fetch one ActiveTrail contact by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching an ActiveTrail contact.

anyOf.description: The ActiveTrail contact state when returned.
Whether the contact is opted in when returned.
The contact email address when returned.
The contact SMS value when returned.
The contact first name when returned.
The contact last name when returned.

data.description: The raw object returned by ActiveTrail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for one ActiveTrail contact.

actions.name: get_group
actions.description: Fetch one ActiveTrail group by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching an ActiveTrail group.

anyOf.description: The number of active contacts in the group when returned.
The total number of contacts in the group when returned.
The group creation timestamp when returned.
The last dynamic-group generation timestamp when returned.

data.description: The raw object returned by ActiveTrail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for one ActiveTrail group.

actions.name: list_contacts
actions.description: List ActiveTrail contacts with optional state, search, date, and pagination filters.

customer_state.description: The ActiveTrail CustomerStates filter used by contact list endpoints.

search_term.description: Text used to filter ActiveTrail contacts.

from_date.description: Only include contacts changed on or after this date.

to_date.description: Only include contacts changed on or before this date.

page.description: The zero-based page number requested from ActiveTrail.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to request from ActiveTrail.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing ActiveTrail contacts.

anyOf.description: The ActiveTrail contact state when returned.
Whether the contact is opted in when returned.
The contact email address when returned.
The contact SMS value when returned.
The contact first name when returned.
The contact last name when returned.

data.description: The raw object returned by ActiveTrail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing contacts.

actions.name: list_group_members
actions.description: List members in an ActiveTrail group with optional filters.

customer_state.description: The ActiveTrail CustomerStates filter used by contact list endpoints.

search_term.description: Text used to filter group members.

from_date.description: Only include members changed on or after this date.

to_date.description: Only include members changed on or before this date.

page.description: The zero-based page number requested from ActiveTrail.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to request from ActiveTrail.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing ActiveTrail group members.

anyOf.description: The total count returned by ActiveTrail when present.
The ActiveTrail contact state when returned.
Whether the contact is opted in when returned.
The contact email address when returned.
The contact SMS value when returned.
The contact first name when returned.
The contact last name when returned.

data.description: The raw object returned by ActiveTrail.

contacts.description: The group members returned by ActiveTrail.

data.description: The raw object returned by ActiveTrail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing group members.

actions.name: list_groups
actions.description: List ActiveTrail groups with optional search and pagination filters.

search_term.description: Text used to filter ActiveTrail groups.

page.description: The zero-based page number requested from ActiveTrail.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to request from ActiveTrail.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing ActiveTrail groups.

anyOf.description: The number of active contacts in the group when returned.
The total number of contacts in the group when returned.
The group creation timestamp when returned.
The last dynamic-group generation timestamp when returned.

data.description: The raw object returned by ActiveTrail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing groups.

actions.name: remove_group_member
actions.description: Remove one contact from an ActiveTrail group.

member_id.description: The ActiveTrail contact ID to remove from the group.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for removing a group member.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request was accepted by ActiveTrail.

data.description: The raw delete response returned by ActiveTrail, if any.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after deleting an ActiveTrail record.

subscribe_ip.description: The subscribe IP address recorded for the contact.

zip_code.description: The contact ZIP or postal code.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating an ActiveTrail contact. Additional ActiveTrail contact fields are passed through.

anyOf.description: The ActiveTrail contact state when returned.
Whether the contact is opted in when returned.
The contact email address when returned.
The contact SMS value when returned.
The contact first name when returned.
The contact last name when returned.

data.description: The raw object returned by ActiveTrail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for one ActiveTrail contact.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating an ActiveTrail group.

anyOf.description: The number of active contacts in the group when returned.
The total number of contacts in the group when returned.
The group creation timestamp when returned.
The last dynamic-group generation timestamp when returned.

data.description: The raw object returned by ActiveTrail.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for one ActiveTrail group.
